_comment: v3.2 state file for the engineering-digest skill. Populated 2026-05-19 from a back-scan of issues 7-10 in issues/, then updated normally on each published issue. Updated on the Issue 16 deliver (2026-06-26).

_season_note: New season started Issue 16 (week 1): 'Ways of working in the agent era — operating-model change after adoption', opened with Spotify (Niklas Gustavsson) 'coding is no longer the constraint'. Per the v1.35 long-form-variety discipline and the 'don't let agent-era practice dominate' rule, the NEXT season after this one should pull from the technical-leadership or managing-upwards theme pools rather than another AI/agent theme. The prior 'Career frameworks & ladder design' season (Issue 14) was cut short at week 1; Issue 15 ran an off-theme qualifying piece. The EM-role-split material (Moreau/Zopa) remains available to inform a future In Practice but was deliberately not used as the Issue 16 In Practice piece to honour the spirit of the no-repeat-featured-anchor rule (it anchored Issues 14 and 15).
